    <ellipse cx="180" cy="240" rx="5" ry="8" fill="#FFC0CB" transform="rotate(-20)" opacity="0.9" />
    <ellipse cx="420" cy="200" rx="5" ry="8" fill="#FF91A4" transform="rotate(10)" opacity="0.9" />
